tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 2150015 LinkLostErrorBus0

abstract.p: The remote bus link is interrupted.
Can be caused by bad interconnection (RJ45 cables) or interrupted logic powersupplies (+24VL) on remote bus boards (IOBOARD_BE, INK_SUPPLY, IOBOARD_DRAWER, IO-BOARD_DRAWER EXT. INTERFACE)

li.p: Check/replace the RJ45 remote bus cables
Check the logic powersupplies of the remote bus board (bad connection)
